PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO COURT FOR A PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JAN-09-2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
